name: Jack Tucker
blurb: A clown's-eye satire of the hack club comic: Zach Zucker's Jack Tucker weaponizes a soundboard, a runaway mic cord, and pure sweat into the most technically chaotic hour in stand-up.
bio: Jack Tucker is the manic stage persona of American clown-comedian Zach Zucker, founder of the New York comedy variety night Stamptown and formerly half of the duo Zach & Viggo with Viggo Venn. Built around a soundboard of snorts, stings, and music samples plus a constantly-tangling mic cord, "Jack Tucker: Comedy Standup Hour" became a breakout at the Edinburgh Fringe and ran Off-Broadway at the SoHo Playhouse (a New York Times Critic's Pick); Zucker was named Comedians' Comedian at the 2020 Chortle Awards. The act was filmed at the Bell House in Brooklyn and released as Tucker's first special on the official Stamptown YouTube channel in 2026, with cameos from Neil Patrick Harris and Dyson Knight of the Baha Men.

timeline.ev: Develops the Jack Tucker character; founds the Stamptown comedy night in New York
Named Comedians' Comedian at the Chortle Awards
Jack Tucker: Comedy Standup Hour breaks out at the Edinburgh Fringe
Off-Broadway run at the SoHo Playhouse — a New York Times Critic's Pick
Releases the filmed special on the Stamptown YouTube channel

accolades: Edinburgh Fringe breakout with Jack Tucker: Comedy Standup Hour
New York Times Critic's Pick (SoHo Playhouse run)

bits.t: What Happened to the Baha Men? (Edinburgh, 2020)
